name: tier2_cci_case_insensitive
description: Tier 2 case-folding path: _CCI_RE uses re.IGNORECASE, and the matched string is upper-cased via m.group(0).upper() before lookup. Body text contains 'cci-000015' lowercase; expected to tag the canonical CCI-000015 objective. Pins that lowercasing the source text doesn't kill the tier. Filename is scan.ckl so the kind-gate (added 2026-06-07) lets the text-scrape branch fire; under a .pdf this case would correctly produce 0 tags.
